---
title: "CV"
toc: false
---

You can download my full CV here:
[**Kim_CV.pdf**](files/cv.pdf) *(last updated 2026)*.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
The PDF is the authoritative version. The summary below is a snapshot.
:::

## Education

- **Ph.D., Political Science**, University of Michigan, 2023
- **M.A., Statistics**, University of Michigan, 2023
- **M.A., Political Science**, Seoul National University, 2016
- **B.A., English Literature & Linguistics** (Political Science minor), Seoul National University, 2013

## Positions

- **Assistant Professor of Data Science**, KDI School of Public Policy and Management, 2023--present
